properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2 v5 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Far away the noise of strife upon my ear is falling, Then I know the sins of earth beset on every hand; Doubt and fear and things of earth in vain to me are calling, None of these shall move me from Beulah Land.

verse.name: v2
v3
verse.lines: Far below the storm of doubt upon the world is beating, Sons of men in battle long the enemy withstand; Safe am I within the castle of God’s word retreating, Nothing there can reach me, ’tis Beulah Land.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Let the stormy breezes blow, their cry cannot alarm me, I am safely sheltered here, protected by God’s hand; Here the sun is always shining, Here there’s naught can harm me, I am safe forever in Beulah Land.

verse.name: v5
